scripts.start: node scripts/railway-db-guard.mjs && node scripts/ensure-database.mjs && node scripts/auto-bootstrap-railway.mjs && next start
scripts.validate:schema: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='database/migrations/001_init_postgresql.sql'; if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('Missing',p); process.exit(1);} console.log('OK:', p);"
scripts.db:generate: node -e "console.log('[LeadFlow] No ORM codegen — using pg + SQL in database/migrations/.'); process.exit(0);"
scripts.db:push: node -e "console.error('[LeadFlow] db:push is not used. Apply database/migrations/*.sql via Supabase or psql.'); process.exit(1);"
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: node -e "console.warn('[LeadFlow] Apply database/migrations/*.sql to Postgres (Supabase SQL editor or psql). No auto-migrate runner.'); process.exit(0);"
